videos.title: Trying VIRAL TikTok Makeup Trends
videos.description: In this video I'm reviewing L'Oreal lipstick and more!
videos.transcript: Hey guys welcome back to my channel! I'm NikkieTutorials and today we're doing something super exciting. Don't forget to like and subscribe! I've been repurchasing this Urban Decay setting spray for years — it's the best ever. So I picked up the Morphe brushes and wanted to share my thoughts. This is a game changer! The The Ordinary skincare is perfect for my skin. This MAC lipstick lasts all day and I love the natural finish. I've been repurchasing this Rare Beauty blush for years — it's the best ever. I love products with retinol for anti-aging, it really transforms your skin. This cleanser has salicylic acid which is great for acne-prone skin. Centella asiatica extract is amazing for calming irritated skin. For my skincare routine, I always start with a cleanser, then apply my serum with hyaluronic acid, and finish with moisturizer. SPF is non-negotiable of course! Anyway that's it for today's video! Let me know in the comments what you think and I'll see you guys in my next video. Bye!

videos.transcript: Hey guys welcome back to my channel! I'm Tati and today we're doing something super exciting. Don't forget to like and subscribe! Today I'm trying out the Huda Beauty foundation for the first time. The Fenty Beauty highlighter is so blendable and gives a gorgeous result. Amazing formula, I highly recommend this Drunk Elephant serum. Amazing formula, I highly recommend this NYX setting spray. This Colourpop eyeshadow lasts all day and I love the natural finish. Glycolic acid in this toner helps with exfoliation and skin texture. This sunscreen has SPF 50 with zinc oxide for broad spectrum protection. I love that this has squalane — it's so lightweight and hydrating. For my skincare routine, I always start with a cleanser, then apply my serum with hyaluronic acid, and finish with moisturizer. SPF is non-negotiable of course! Anyway that's it for today's video! Let me know in the comments what you think and I'll see you guys in my next video. Bye!

For my skincare routine, I always start with a cleanser, then apply my serum with hyaluronic acid, and finish with moisturizer. SPF is non-negotiable of course! Anyway that's it for today's video! Let me know in the comments what you think and I'll see you guys in my next video. Bye!

videos.transcript: Hey guys welcome back to my channel! I'm Milabu and today we're doing something super exciting. Don't forget to like and subscribe! The Huda Beauty eyeshadow broke me out, I had such a bad reaction to it. Let's see how the Maybelline lipstick compares to other options. Amazing formula, I highly recommend this CeraVe moisturizer. I'm obsessed with Benefit's new mascara, it looks so beautiful. I absolutely love this Rare Beauty foundation, it's my holy grail! Vitamin C serums are amazing for brightening and reducing hyperpigmentation. Glycolic acid in this toner helps with exfoliation and skin texture. I love that this has squalane — it's so lightweight and hydrating. For my skincare routine, I always start with a cleanser, then apply my serum with hyaluronic acid, and finish with moisturizer. SPF is non-negotiable of course! Anyway that's it for today's video! Let me know in the comments what you think and I'll see you guys in my next video. Bye!

videos.title: My Morning Skincare Routine featuring Benefit
videos.description: In this video I'm reviewing Benefit mascara and more!
videos.transcript: Hey guys welcome back to my channel! I'm Milabu and today we're doing something super exciting. Don't forget to like and subscribe! The Huda Beauty foundation is really popular right now. This Anastasia Beverly Hills foundation is absolutely stunning and worth every penny. I was really disappointed with this L'Oreal lipstick, it didn't work for me. I'm obsessed with The Ordinary's new serum, it looks so beautiful. Benefit knocked it out of the park with this blush. Flawless finish. Glycolic acid in this toner helps with exfoliation and skin texture. This cleanser has salicylic acid which is great for acne-prone skin. I love products with retinol for anti-aging, it really transforms your skin. For my skincare routine, I always start with a cleanser, then apply my serum with hyaluronic acid, and finish with moisturizer. SPF is non-negotiable of course! Anyway that's it for today's video! Let me know in the comments what you think and I'll see you guys in my next video. Bye!

videos.title: NO MIRROR Makeup Challenge | Blind Test
videos.description: In this video I'm reviewing Urban Decay setting spray and more!
videos.transcript: Hey guys welcome back to my channel! I'm Ingrid Nilsen and today we're doing something super exciting. Don't forget to like and subscribe! This CeraVe cleanser is absolutely stunning and worth every penny. Amazing formula, I highly recommend this Tatcha moisturizer. I've been repurchasing this Rare Beauty foundation for years — it's the best ever. The Tarte foundation oxidized on my skin and looked terrible after 2 hours. This is a game changer! The Benefit mascara is perfect for my skin. The peptides in this cream help with collagen production. For my skincare routine, I always start with a cleanser, then apply my serum with hyaluronic acid, and finish with moisturizer. SPF is non-negotiable of course! Anyway that's it for today's video! Let me know in the comments what you think and I'll see you guys in my next video. Bye!

Glycolic acid in this toner helps with exfoliation and skin texture. For my skincare routine, I always start with a cleanser, then apply my serum with hyaluronic acid, and finish with moisturizer.
